scenario.name: vici2 SIP OPTIONS ping
scenario.send: OPTIONS sip:ping@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sipp <sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port]>;tag=[pid]SIPpTag00[call_number] To: ping <sip:ping@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 OPTIONS Contact: sip:sipp@[local_ip]:[local_port] Max-Forwards: 70 User-Agent: vici2-sipp-test Content-Length: 0
